h1: Iron & Steel Scrap Buyers in Hyderabad

faqs.q: What price do you pay for iron scrap in Hyderabad?
faqs.a: We currently pay ₹24–28 per kg for iron and steel scrap in Hyderabad, based on the daily market rate. Rate is confirmed at time of pickup after digital weighing.

faqs.q: Do you buy old steel furniture?
faqs.a: Yes. We buy all types of steel furniture including almirahs, shelves, chairs, and beds at full market rate.
